description: Anti-detection resilience: 3 improvements to CDP stealth. (1) Canvas noise injection (fillText/strokeText/toDataURL spoofing). (2) CDP Runtime serialization guard (console monkey-patching to neutralize Error.stack getter detection). (3) waitForStreamComplete rewritten from ~35 polling evals to 1 self-contained awaitPromise eval — reduces Runtime domain exposure by ~5x per search. (4) ±20% jitter on all polling intervals and post-action waits.

asi.hypothesis: Reducing CDP Runtime domain exposure and adding canvas + serialization guards improves resilience against anti-bot detection
asi.canvas_noise: fillText+strokeText alpha noise + toDataURL pixel noise
asi.cdp_serialization_guard: console.log/error/warn/debug/info replace Error args with stripped copies
asi.stream_wait_rewrite: single Runtime.evaluate with awaitPromise=true replaces polling loop
